chapters.title: Friday Tradition
chapters.content: Every Friday, the team went to lunch together. It was the one time nobody talked about deadlines or spreadsheets.

chapters.title: More Than Coworkers
chapters.content: During lunch, they shared travel stories, favorite movies, and funny mistakes from old jobs. The office felt lighter afterward.

chapters.title: Back to Work
chapters.content: Returning to the office, everyone seemed more relaxed. Sometimes productivity starts with simply eating together.
